examples: Locling the screw must spread enough oil, please notice all oil should not contain molybdenum bisulfide additive.
Tetraethyl thiuram disulfide was synthesized one step from diethylamine and carbon bisulfide with hydrogen peroxide (27.5%) as oxidant.
BTEX in air were adsorbed by active carbon tube, replaced carbon bisulfide by dichloromethane as reagent, analyzed by using Capillary GC-FID.
